rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the clearest pattern sits in Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. Fish (34) in Past sets the tone with resource flow is dynamic and responsive. Here, Fish emphasizes where energy, support, and real-world movement either begin feeding the path or reveal what is not actually sustaining it.
